ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "gpu_usage" REAL /* GPU usage as a percentage */,
  "net_latency" REAL /* Network latency in milliseconds */,
  "comput_latency" REAL /* Computation latency in milliseconds */,
  "ete_latency" REAL /* End-to-end latency in milliseconds */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful transactions */,
  "unsuccessful" INTEGER /* Number of unsuccessful transactions */,
  "energy" REAL /* Total energy consumption in watts */,
  "hmd_energy" REAL /* HMD energy consumption in watts */,
  "services_on_hmds" INTEGER /* Number of services running on HMDs */,
  "exec" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance data was collected */,
  "frame_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame rate */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  "hmd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HMD */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage as a percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage as a percentage */,
  "frame_time" REAL /* Time taken to render a single frame in milliseconds */,
  "rendering_quality" REAL /* A metric to measure the quality of rendering */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware being tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_gpu_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_id") REFERENCES gpus ("gpu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_hmd_id FOREIGN KEY ("hmd_id") REFERENCES hmds ("hmd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_frame_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_rate_id") REFERENCES frame_rates ("frame_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hmds" (
  "hmd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HMD */,
  "hmd_name" TEXT /* Name of the HMD */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the HMD */,
  "refresh_rate" INTEGER /* Refresh rate of the HMD in Hz */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the HMD */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was released */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the HMD in grams */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Battery capacity in mAh */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life in hours */,
  "connectivity" TEXT /* Types of connectivity options (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors (e.g., gyroscope, accelerometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hmd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpus" (
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU */,
  "gpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Memory of the GPU in GB */,
  "clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the GPU in GHz */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the GPU */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was released */,
  "shader_cores" INTEGER /* Number of shader cores */,
  "ray_tracing_support" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating support for ray tracing */,
  "api_support" TEXT /* Supported APIs (e.g., DirectX, Vulkan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the network in Mbps */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the network in ms */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the network device */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was released */,
  "security_protocol" TEXT /* Security protocol used (e.g., WPA3) */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the network in meters */,
  "interference" TEXT /* Level of interference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_version" TEXT /* Version of the service */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Other services or dependencies required */,
  "resource_requirements" TEXT /* Resource requirements (e.g., minimum CPU, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "horizontal_pixels" INTEGER /* Horizontal pixels of the resolution */,
  "vertical_pixels" INTEGER /* Vertical pixels of the resolution */,
  "aspect_ratio" TEXT /* Aspect ratio of the resolution */,
  "pixel_density" INTEGER /* Pixel density in PPI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_rates" (
  "frame_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame rate */,
  "frame_rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame rate */,
  "frames_per_second" INTEGER /* Frames per second of the frame rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hmd_service_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "hmd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HMD */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hmd_service_associations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hmd_service_associations_hmd_id FOREIGN KEY ("hmd_id") REFERENCES hmds ("hmd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpu_hmd_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU */,
  "hmd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HMD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpu_hmd_associations_hmd_id FOREIGN KEY ("hmd_id") REFERENCES hmds ("hmd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpu_hmd_associations_gpu_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_id") REFERENCES gpus ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_hmd_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "hmd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HMD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_hmd_associations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_hmd_associations_hmd_id FOREIGN KEY ("hmd_id") REFERENCES hmds ("hmd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., %, ms, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each performance data entry
Number of services running on HMDs
Date and time the performance data was collected
Time taken to render a single frame in milliseconds
A metric to measure the quality of rendering
Version of the software being tested
Version of the hardware being tested

Weight of the HMD in grams
Types of connectivity options (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)

Clock speed of the GPU in GHz
Boolean indicating support for ray tracing
Bandwidth of the network in Mbps
Latency of the network in ms
Range of the network in meters

Frames per second of the frame rate
